expectations.evidence: Section 1 states: 'Loaded the Triage Issue workflow from skills/triage-issue.md' with 6-step process.

expectations.text: Searches by error type (NullPointerException), class (UserService), and method (getProfile)
expectations.evidence: Strategy A searches 'text ~ "NullPointerException UserService getProfile"'. Strategy B searches 'text ~ "UserService"'. Strategy D searches 'summary ~ "NullPointerException"'.
All search strategies include 'project = BACKEND' in their JQL queries.

expectations.text: Checks for resolved similar issues (regression detection)
expectations.evidence: Section 4 'Regression Check' shows a dedicated query: 'project = BACKEND AND issuetype = Bug AND text ~ "NullPointerException UserService" AND statusCategory = Done' plus a reopened bugs check using 'status CHANGED FROM Done TO Open'.

expectations.text: If creating new, uses structured bug format with Component, Error, Steps, Expected/Actual
expectations.evidence: Section 5 shows a structured bug description with: Error, Where, Stack Trace, Trigger, Frequency, Expected Behavior, Actual Behavior, Environment sections.
